Check In Juga Akan Mengajak Interaksi Dengan Masyarakat Melalui Voxpop Tentang Tema Yang Dibahas.

programme.title: Obral (Obrolan Viral)
programme.desc: Obral (Obrolan Viral) Merupakan Program Informasi Yang Dipandu Oleh Dua Host Untuk Menyajikan Berita Terkini, Video Viral Dan Membahas Hal-Hal Unik Yang Dibicarakan Publik Secara Santai Dan Unik Dengan Format Semi Podcast Ala Radio Show.

programme.title: Veiled Musician
programme.desc: Ajang Pencarian Bakat Menyanyi Revolusioner Asal Korea Selatan Di Mana Identitas Visual Peserta Dirahasiakan. Juri Hanya Menilai Berdasarkan Vokal Dan Musikalitas Murni. Peserta Tampil Di Balik Layar Atau Mengenakan Penutup Wajah, Menantang Bias Terhadap Penampilan Fisik.

programme.title: Layar Drama Indonesia - Semua Indah Karena Cinta (Rr)
Mega Film Tv Malam
programme.desc: Program Yang Menayangkan Ftv/Series Yang Ditayangkan Malam Hari. Ftv/Series Dari Berbagai Genre Seperti Romansa Dan Komedi Yang Seru Dan Menghibur Untuk Disaksikan.

programme.title: Mega Film Tv Malam
programme.desc: Program Yang Menayangkan Ftv/Series Yang Ditayangkan Malam Hari. Ftv/Series Dari Berbagai Genre Seperti Romansa Dan Komedi Yang Seru Dan Menghibur Untuk Disaksikan.

programme.title: Preman Pensiun (Rr)
programme.desc: Pensiunnya Bahar (Pemimpin Preman) Dan Kekacauan Yang Terjadi Di Wilayah Kekuasaannya Setelah Ia Menyerahkan Urusan Pada Tangan Kanannya, Muslihat, Yang Kemudian Mencoba Mengambil Alih, Memicu Konflik Dengan Anak Buah Seperti Jamal Dan Komar, Memaksa Bahar Turun Tangan Lagi Untuk Menyelesaikan Masalah Dan Mengembalikan Ketertiban, Seperti Kasus Tanah Di Kampung Dan Penahanan Jamal.

programme.title: Dunia Anak - Upin Ipin
programme.desc: Upin Dan Ipin Adalah Sepasang Saudara Kembar Yang Tinggal Bersama Kak Ros Dan Mak Uda (Biasa Dipanggil Opah) Di Kampung Durian Runtuh Setelah Kematian Kedua Orang Tua Mereka Saat Mereka Masih Bayi. Keseharian Mereka Di Kampung Durian Runtuk Dan Sekolah Tadika Mesra Sangatlah Penuh Warna Karena Dikelilingi Teman-Teman Yang Baik.

programme.title: Dunia Anak - Entong
programme.desc: Bocah Penyayang Berusia 10 Tahun Bernama Entong Tinggal Di Pinggiran Kota Jakarta Bersama Teman-Temannya. Selain Sahabat Dekatnya, Entong Juga Memiliki Musuh Bebuyutan Bernama Memed. Permusuhan Di Antara Mereka Mewarnai Kisah Kehidupan Sehari-Hari Entong Dan Teman-Temannya.

programme.title: Dunia Anak Spesial Liburan
programme.desc: Program Yang Menayangkan Film Dan Animasi Anak Yang Seru Dan Menghibur Untuk Disaksikan Selama Moment Liburan.

programme.title: Go Spot
programme.desc: Program Yang Menayangkan Film Dari Berbagai Genre Seperti Romansa Dan Komedi Yang Seru Dan Menghibur Untuk Disaksikan Selama Moment Liburan.

programme.title: Seputar iNews Siang
programme.desc: Program Berita Yang Menyajikan Rangkuman Berita-Berita Penting Dan Terkini Yang Terjadi Di Dalam Dan Luar Negeri. Dari Politik, Ekonomi, Hukum, Hingga Peristiwa Sosial Dan Olahraga, Semua Dikupas Tuntas Di Sini.

programme.title: Layar Drama Indonesia - Mencintaimu Sekali Lagi (Rr)
Mega Film Tv - Iiihhh Serrreemm
programme.desc: Program Yang Menayangkan Ftv/Series Yang Ditayangkan Malam Hari. Ftv/Series Dari Berbagai Genre Seperti Romansa Dan Komedi Yang Seru Dan Menghibur Untuk Disaksikan.

programme.title: Layar Drama Indonesia : Preman Pensiun Deui
programme.desc: Pensiunnya Bahar (Pemimpin Preman) Dan Kekacauan Yang Terjadi Di Wilayah Kekuasaannya Setelah Ia Menyerahkan Urusan Pada Tangan Kanannya, Muslihat, Yang Kemudian Mencoba Mengambil Alih, Memicu Konflik Dengan Anak Buah Seperti Jamal Dan Komar, Memaksa Bahar Turun Tangan Lagi Untuk Menyelesaikan Masalah Dan Mengembalikan Ketertiban, Seperti Kasus Tanah Di Kampung Dan Penahanan Jamal.

programme.title: Layar Drama Indonesia : Preman Pensiun Deui
programme.desc: Pensiunnya Bahar (Pemimpin Preman) Dan Kekacauan Yang Terjadi Di Wilayah Kekuasaannya Setelah Ia Menyerahkan Urusan Pada Tangan Kanannya, Muslihat, Yang Kemudian Mencoba Mengambil Alih, Memicu Konflik Dengan Anak Buah Seperti Jamal Dan Komar, Memaksa Bahar Turun Tangan Lagi Untuk Menyelesaikan Masalah Dan Mengembalikan Ketertiban, Seperti Kasus Tanah Di Kampung Dan Penahanan Jamal.

programme.title: Layar Drama Indonesia : Terikat Janji
programme.desc: Davina Rosalia Kusuma, Putri Pengusaha, Tampak Hidup Sempurna Namun Menyimpan Luka Sejak Ibunya Meninggal Dan Ayahnya Menikah Lagi. Ia Merasa Terasing, Terlebih Setelah Cinta Pertamanya, Ryan, Menghilang. Sepuluh Tahun Kemudian, Pertunangannya Dengan Dipa Hancur Karena Perselingkuhan Dengan Adik Tirinya, Jihan. Di Tengah Keterpurukan, Davina Bertemu Sena, Penjual Ketoprak Yang Ternyata Polisi Intel Yang Menyelidiki Dipa. Davina Meminta Sena Berpura-Pura Menjadi Pacarnya, Namun Hubungan Palsu Itu Berubah Menjadi Nyata. Tanpa Ia Tahu, Sena Juga Mencari Kebenaran Tentang Hilangnya Ryan-Membawa Mereka Pada Rahasia, Balas Dendam, Dan Perasaan Yang Tak Terduga.

programme.title: Layar Drama Indonesia : Turun Ranjang
programme.desc: Menceritakan Tentang Seorang Perempuan Bernama Naza Yang Dipaksa Menikahi Alby, Kakak Iparnya, Demi Kepentingan Keluarga Setelah Kakaknya Yang Bernama Zia, Koma Usai Melahirkan. Awalnya Naza Menolak Karena Masih Mencintai Pacarnya Yang Bernama Natha, Namun Keadaan Memaksanya Menerima Pernikahan Itu Dan Merawat Anak Zia Dan Alby Yaitu Leon. Hidup Bersama Membuat Naza Dan Alby Perlahan Saling Memahami Dan Menumbuhkan Perasaan, Meski Naza Kerap Kali Diliputi Oleh Rasa Bersalah. Konflik Memuncak Saat Naza Mengetahui Natha Hanya Mengincar Harta Keluarganya, Sehingga Naza Harus Memilih Antara Masa Lalu Atau Membuka Hati Pada Keluarga Baru Yang Mulai Ia Terima.

programme.title: Microdrama + : Dari Jalanan Jadi Tunangan
programme.desc: Talita Tumbuh Sebagai Anak Pungut Dalam Keluarga Yang Mengelola Restaurant. Ia Diperlakukan Seperti Pembantu Oleh Ibu Tiri Dan Kakaknya, Ratna & Nindy. Suatu Ketika Ia Diusir Dari Rumah Karena Menyampaikan Fakta Bahwa Andhika, Pacar Nindy, Bukan Orang Baik. Ia Lalu Bertemu Pria Asing, Revan, Yang Mengaku Sebagai Supir Taksi. Ia Tak Tahu Kalau Pria Itu Adalah Cucu Seorang Konglomerat, Dan Faktanya Ia Telah Dijodohkan Dengan Pria Itu Sejak Lama.

programme.title: Dunia Anak - Upin Ipin
programme.desc: Upin Dan Ipin Adalah Sepasang Saudara Kembar Yang Tinggal Bersama Kak Ros Dan Mak Uda (Biasa Dipanggil Opah) Di Kampung Durian Runtuh Setelah Kematian Kedua Orang Tua Mereka Saat Mereka Masih Bayi. Keseharian Mereka Di Kampung Durian Runtuk Dan Sekolah Tadika Mesra Sangatlah Penuh Warna Karena Dikelilingi Teman-Teman Yang Baik.

programme.title: Dunia Anak - Entong
programme.desc: Bocah Penyayang Berusia 10 Tahun Bernama Entong Tinggal Di Pinggiran Kota Jakarta Bersama Teman-Temannya. Selain Sahabat Dekatnya, Entong Juga Memiliki Musuh Bebuyutan Bernama Memed. Permusuhan Di Antara Mereka Mewarnai Kisah Kehidupan Sehari-Hari Entong Dan Teman-Temannya.

programme.title: Microdrama + : Backstreet Marriage
programme.desc: Sabrina Menikah Dengan Max Tanpa Sepengetahuan Papanya, Alberto Salin Konglomerat Yang Ingin Menjodohkan Sabrina Dengan Dallen. programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma
programme.desc: Dan is a struggling rancher who volunteers to safely deliver Ben Wade, the captured leader of a gang of thieves, to a train station where the 3:10 to Yuma will transport him to trial. Ben's gang of cutthroats and robbers has other plans.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: In postwar Japan, Godzilla brings new devastation to an already scorched landscape. With no military intervention or government help in sight, the survivors must join together in the face of despair and fight back against an unrelenting horror.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award?-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Ring Of Fire Part 1
programme.desc: An oil rig triggers a volcanic eruption, kick starting a cataclysmic series along the Ring of Fire. If the eruptions aren't stopped, Earth faces an extinction-level event.

programme.title: Ring Of Fire Part 2
programme.desc: An oil rig triggers a volcanic eruption, kick starting a cataclysmic series along the Ring of Fire. If the eruptions aren't stopped, Earth faces an extinction-level event.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In *12 Monkeys*, Bruce Willis plays a time-traveling convict trying to prevent a deadly virus, while Brad Pitt shines as a manic asylum inmate. Directed by Terry Gilliam, it's a mind-bending sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In *12 Monkeys*, Bruce Willis plays a time-traveling convict trying to prevent a deadly virus, while Brad Pitt shines as a manic asylum inmate. Directed by Terry Gilliam, it's a mind-bending sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation-but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Beri Cinta Waktu
programme.desc: Sinetron romansa tentang perjalanan Trian (Yesaya Abraham) mencari keadilan dan mengungkap kejahatan pasca Adila, istrinya meninggal dunia, dengan bantuan Rama (Rayn Wijaya) dan Asmara (Angela Gilsha). Tayang setiap hari pukul 20.10 WIB

programme.title: Jejak Duka Diandra
programme.desc: Kisah cinta Diandra (Michelle Ziudith) dan Dimitri (Rio Dewanto) yang semula indah seketika berubah drastis setelah Yunita (Baiti Syaghaf), saudara tiri Diandra mengaku mencintai Dimitri. Dimitri terjebak dalam situasi sulit akibat ulah sang adik, Jupiter (Bizael) yang menuduh Dimitri melecehkan Yunita. Hubungan Dimitri dengan Diandra pun semakin merenggang. Tuduhan lainnya juga harus diterima Dimitri sebagai penyebab insiden kecelakaan seorang wanita. Posisi Dimitri semakin terpojok setelah Diandra yang diminta sebagai saksi justru tidak berpihak kepadanya hingga Dimitri mendapat sanksi mendekam di balik jeruji besi selama lima tahun. Lima tahun berlalu, Dimitri hidup bebas dan melanjutkan usaha sang ayah. Ia pun membuka kisah cinta baru dengan Melissa (Tasya Panggabean). Takdir pun berkata lain, pertemuan Dimitri dan Diandra kembali terjadi. Tayang setiap hari pukul 21.30 WIB

Ruang Redaksi
programme.desc: Ruang Redaksi di Sin Po TV adalah program bincang-bincang yang membawa pemirsa ke balik layar proses redaksi berita. Program ini menghadirkan jurnalis, editor, dan pengamat media untuk membahas sudut pandang, tantangan, dan etika pemberitaan. Setiap episode menggali bagaimana isu menjadi penting, verifikasi fakta, dan keputusan editorial diambil, menunjukkan kerja keras serta integritas jurnalistik. Program ini juga sering membahas tren media dan literasi digital. Dengan format santai namun informatif, Ruang Redaksi bertujuan membangun kepercayaan publik pada media dan meningkatkan pemahaman tentang peran vital jurnalisme.

programme.title: Sorotan Dunia
programme.desc: Sorotan Dunia di Sin Po TV adalah program diskusi yang menganalisis isu-isu krusial di Indonesia secara mendalam. Berbeda dari berita biasa, program ini menggali akar masalah, implikasi, dan berbagai perspektif dari para ahli. Setiap episode membahas topik utama seperti kebijakan pemerintah, politik, ekonomi, sosial, atau budaya. Dengan menghadirkan narasumber kredibel, Sorotan Utama bertujuan membantu pemirsa memahami kompleksitas isu dan membentuk opini yang terinformasi. Program ini ideal bagi siapa saja yang ingin mendapatkan pemahaman lebih dalam tentang dinamika yang memengaruhi Indonesia.

programme.title: Catatan Kriminal
programme.desc: Catatan Kriminal di Sin Po TV menyajikan rangkuman peristiwa kriminalitas, pengungkapan kasus kepolisian, serta fenomena sosial-hukum terkini. Program ini hadir dengan informasi yang akurat dan edukatif guna mendorong kewaspadaan masyarakat demi terciptanya lingkungan yang lebih aman.

programme.title: Mamah & Aa
programme.desc: Mamah & Aa siap menjawab curhatan jamaah dengan gaya yang lugas, ceplas-ceplos, dan penuh hikmah. Didampingi Aa Abdel, program ini mengupas tuntas persoalan agama dalam kehidupan sehari-hari dengan cara yang ringan namun tetap mendalam. "Curhat dong, Mah!"

programme.title: Islam Penuh Cinta
programme.desc: Islam Penuh Cinta di Sin Po TV adalah program tausiyah agama islam, yang menampilkan Islam sebagai agama rahmat bagi semesta alam. Memberikan pemahaman konsep cinta dari sudut pandang Islam yang terdapat dalam Al-quran dan Hadist. Selain memeberikan ilmu ke islaman, Islam penuh cinta juga mengajak pemirsa memahami nilai-nilai persatuan, persaudaraan, keadilan, dan kepedulian serta menumbuhkan cinta serta damai di hati setiap orang.

programme.title: Menyapa Indonesia Pagi
programme.desc: Menyapa Indonesia Pagi di Sin Po TV adalah program berita dan informasi yang mengawali hari pemirsa dengan berita terkini. Acara ini menyajikan gambaran lengkap peristiwa penting semalam dan isu yang akan menjadi perhatian hari ini. Program ini mencakup berita nasional dan internasional, ekonomi, cuaca, lalu lintas, gaya hidup, dan cerita inspiratif, seringkali dengan dialog interaktif bersama narasumber. Dengan penyampaian yang hangat dan dinamis, tujuannya adalah membangkitkan semangat positif dan membekali pemirsa dengan informasi relevan untuk memulai aktivitas, menjadikannya pilihan tepat untuk tetap terhubung dengan perkembangan terbaru.

programme.title: Bincang Spesial
programme.desc: Bincang Spesial di Sin Po TV adalah program wawancara mendalam yang menghadirkan tokoh-tokoh penting dan berpengaruh. Melalui percakapan yang tajam, program ini berupaya membongkar sisi lain narasumber, termasuk tantangan dan prinsip hidup mereka. Dengan penyampaian intim dan personal, Bincang Spesial bertujuan memberikan wawasan eksklusif, menginspirasi, dan mendorong pemahaman tentang kepemimpinan serta kontribusi dalam masyarakat. programme.title: Ketawa Ala SUCA
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (SUCA) merupakan ajang pencarian bakat komika tanah air. Dalam program ini, para komika berkumpul dan tampil membawakan materi-materi lucu untuk menghibur penonton dengan sajian komedi segar dan menggelitik.

programme.title: Golden Memories 2
programme.desc: Menghadirkan kompetisi bernyanyi lagu lawas era 70, 80, hingga 90-an. Saksikan persaingan sengit para peserta dalam membawakan tembang kenangan legendaris, dilengkapi komentar menarik para juri dan hiburan segar yang siap menemani malam Anda.

programme.title: Menyapa Indonesia Petang
programme.desc: Menyapa Indonesia Petang di Sin Po TV adalah program berita utama sore hari yang merangkum seluruh peristiwa penting sepanjang hari. Acara ini memberikan gambaran komprehensif tentang dinamika politik, ekonomi, sosial, dan budaya di Indonesia dan dunia. Setiap episode menyajikan berita terkini, laporan mendalam, dan analisis dari ahli, serta update isu hangat, cuaca, dan segmen inspiratif. Dengan penyampaian yang padat informasi dan mudah dicerna, program ini membekali pemirsa dengan pemahaman menyeluruh tentang perkembangan terkini di penghujung hari.

programme.title: Menyapa Indonesia Malam
programme.desc: Menyapa Indonesia Malam di Sin Po TV adalah program berita penutup hari yang merangkum dan menganalisis peristiwa penting sepanjang hari. Acara ini memberikan gambaran komprehensif tentang dinamika politik, ekonomi, sosial, dan budaya di Indonesia dan global. Setiap episode menyajikan berita utama, laporan eksklusif, dan analisis tajam dari para ahli, menggali latar belakang, implikasi, dan berbagai sudut pandang isu relevan. Program ini juga sering menyertakan segmen khusus tentang tren atau kisah inspiratif. Dengan penyampaian yang analitis dan mendalam, tujuannya adalah membekali pemirsa dengan pemahaman utuh dan menjadi referensi penting untuk insight lebih dalam hingga larut malam.

programme.title: The Wild Life Of Tim Faulkner Season 3
programme.desc: Di alam yang penuh misteri, Tim Faulkner, hadir membawa anda lebih dekat dengan satwa liar di habitat aslinya. Dari penyelamatan hewan langka, menghadapi predator berbahaya hingga petualangan ekstrem

programme.desc: In Courseulles-sur-Mer, the Juno Beach centre aims to divide its carbon footprint by five by 2050. In its reuse centres, the Respire association, present in the Caen area, offers all kinds of second-hand items. The Hangar Zero, in Le Havre, is becoming a place dedicated to the ecological transition.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Partis Skier
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas are in complete autonomy deep in the remote wilderness of Kluane National Park. Facing unpredictable weather and no emergency support, their knowledge is put to the test.

programme.title: La Cuisine D'Isabelle Et Ricardo
programme.desc: For brunch, Isabelle makes waffle batter, recommending preparation the day before for a fluffy result. Sweet or savory variations, including a ham and poached egg topping with bearnaise sauce.

programme.title: Interieurs
programme.desc: In Marseille, Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits the woodworking workshop of Carles and Demarquet. She then goes to the workshop of Senimo, a carpenter in Ivry-sur-Seine.

programme.title: 6H Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: La Cuisine D'Isabelle Et Ricardo
programme.desc: For brunch, Isabelle makes waffle batter, recommending preparation the day before for a fluffy result. Sweet or savory variations, including a ham and poached egg topping with bearnaise sauce.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Partis Skier
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas are in complete autonomy deep in the remote wilderness of Kluane National Park. Facing unpredictable weather and no emergency support, their knowledge is put to the test.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes

In its reuse centres, the Respire association, present in the Caen area, offers all kinds of second-hand items. programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Il Etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'Objets
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'Imagier Anime De Koumi
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'Afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Capitaine Marleau
programme.desc: Concerned about the sudden disappearance of their colleague Sunlight, the dancers of the famous Parisian cabaret La Nouvelle Eve contact the police. Without losing her usual wit, Captain Marleau, assigned to the case, shakes up the nightlife scene.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Just Kids
programme.desc: Jack, 19; Lisa, 17, and 10 year-old Mathis, suddenly find themselves orphaned. Whilst Lisa distances herself from the other two, Jack is made Mathis' guardian. A new life begins... But how to assume the responsibility of bringing up a child when you are hardly more than a teenager yourself?

programme.title: Temps De Chien
programme.desc: The end of the pandemic put an end to Alice's side job, writing funeral orations, and her novel's publication is canceled. To help her out of this very bad patch, her fortune teller suggests writing horoscopes for cats and dogs.

programme.title: Temps De Chien
programme.desc: The end of the pandemic put an end to Alice's side job, writing funeral orations, and her novel's publication is canceled. To help her out of this very bad patch, her fortune teller suggests writing horoscopes for cats and dogs.

programme.title: Terrain De Jeu
programme.desc: In the Lofoten archipelago in northern Norway, Raed Hammoud discovered an unusual football pitch nestling in the fjords: the Henningsvaer Stadion. In Oslo, he notes that the Norwegians, great fans of winter sports, are also, above all, football fans.

programme.title: Terrain De Jeu
programme.desc: In a small village on the Amalfi Coast, Raed Hammoud explores a spectacular football pitch nestled between rugged mountains and the Mediterranean Sea: the Diego Armando Maradona Stadium. In Naples, he meets the people behind SSC Napoli, the pride of the city.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: C'Est Mathematique ! Avec Iman
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine
programme.desc: Frog and her guide cross the starting line in the para-athletics women's 5,000 metres, but nothing goes quite according to plan.

programme.title: Belfort Et Lupin
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'Aventure Du Monde Des Mondes
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Foot Go
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

programme.title: Marocains Du Ciel
programme.desc: Touria Chaoui is expelled from her examination room: she is accused of cheating. She is devastated. Only one of her teachers, Noukira, suspects a setup and investigates among the students.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'Hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: L'Echappee Belge
programme.desc: From Charleville-Mezieres to the Langres plateau, Adrien Joveneau and comedian Manon Lepomme travel to the headwaters of the Meuse, exploring its heritage, nature and local encounters.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: A Norman born in Granville, Johanna discovered tango in New York, a love at first sight that led her to Argentina. She fell in love with the country and with Maximiliano, whom she met during a class. Argentine of modest origins, former footballer and future mathematics teacher, he turned to dance after being deeply moved by a song.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match
programme.desc: Silver medalist in long jump at the Tokyo 2020 Paralympic Games: Dimitri Pavade is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: Richard Orlinski explores contemporary francophone dance through three journeys. Josephine Pra, a classical and neoclassical dancer, introduces him to the fundamentals and evolutions of her art. At the 104 in Paris, they experiment with the fusion of technical rigor and expressive freedom. For his part, Mourad Merzouki, a major figure in contemporary hip-hop, boldly blends dance, circus and martial arts in engaged creations, carried by a multicultural troupe. Oussama Elyousfi, a dancer with the Kafig company directed by the Lyon-based choreographer, bears witness to this encounter between urban cultures and artistic institutions.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'Aventures
programme.desc: During the Canadian winter, Jonathan Pinsonnault teaches paragliding in Colima, on Mexico's western coast. The instructor welcomes Julio, Caroline and Renald: one wanting to obtain their flight certificate and the others looking to perfect their technique.

programme.title: Peaux Noires : Quel Heritage ?
programme.desc: What intimate and social relationship do Black French-speaking people have with their skin color? Through personal testimonies, expert contributions and innovative visual staging, the series explores the historical and cultural evolution of the representation of Black skin.

programme.title: Tendance Xxi
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise
programme.desc: In the heart of Brittany, visit the Pont-Aven museum. Interior design and a passion for cinema come together in Sandra Benhamou's world. Lacoste reinvents itself under the leadership of Pelagia Kolotouros. Patient and meticulous, restorer Marie-Cecile Kfouri brings frescoes and old canvases back to life.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: A Boire Et A Manger
programme.desc: With a leg of lamb from the Haut-Vallon farm and farmhouse cider from the Choiniere orchards, Vanessa Pilon, Remi-Pierre Paquin and Lindsay Brun have all they need for a meal to please the eye and delight the palate. They are accompanied by Josee Deschenes and Guillaume Lambert.

programme.title: Parlons Eco
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Voyage Voyage, Les Stars Chantent Au Maroc
programme.desc: In Morocco, a land of contrasts and traditions, artists come together for an intimate and spectacular adventure. From Rabat to Ouarzazate, via Fez, they choose iconic locations to perform cult songs. Each one comes to life in these magical landscapes, for a breathtaking and unprecedented musical exploration.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Ness Et Rayan
programme.desc: Ness, an experienced police officer, catches young Rayan in the act as he tries to steal her wallet. Sentenced to perform community service in a police station, Rayan must serve as driver for the woman who arrested him.

programme.title: Tendance Xxi
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Le Petit Piaf
programme.desc: In Reunion Island, Nelson, 10 years old, dreams of a career in music and applies to the show ''Star Kids''. Pierre Leroy, an artist whose career is faltering, happens to be on tour on the island. Nelson asks him for advice, but things do not go well with the disillusioned old singer.

programme.title: Mad Concrete Dreams Ep5
programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.
